question: A fault event was recently logged on T-006. Retrieve the fault details, estimate the expected repair downtime, open a corrective work order, and then mark it as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded.
answer:
The fault details of the recent event on T-006 are: Fault ID: F001, Fault Type: Line Breakage, Location: Substation Gamma, Voltage (V): 33000, Current (A): 235, Power Load (MW): 32.97, Temperature (°C): 25.7, Wind Speed (km/h): 7.1, Weather Condition: Windy, Maintenance Status: Scheduled, Component Health: Normal, Duration (hours): 3.1, Downtime (hours): 7.

The estimated downtime for T-006, given its severity as critical and the fault type as Line Breakage, is between 48 and 120 hours, with a typical estimate of 72 hours.

A corrective work order was created for the maintenance of T-006, with the issue description as Line Breakage at Substation Gamma, priority as high, fault type as Line Breakage, and estimated downtime as 72 hours.

The work order is marked as in-progress with an estimated duration of 72 hours.
